SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR #12365.

Edward A. Nagy, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Shu Ying Zhou Wong and Kalvin C. Wong.
Plaintiff Shu Ying Zhou Wong was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Joel Torres or Vilma Torres.
Defendants answer to the complaint was filed on October 25,2010.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on November 1, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Shu Ying Zhou Wong and Kalvin C. Wong, and against defendants Joel Torres and Vilma Torres as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,790.00.
Holdover Damages - $2,599.00.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $385.00.

Total - $5,974.00.

Additionally, plaintiffs Zhu Ying Zhou Wong and Kalvin C. Wong are is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 910 Plymouth Avenue (upstairs), San Francisco, CA 94112. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of NOV-15-2010 remains on calendar.
